rootCause: The helm-oci-install wrapper delegated directly to `helm upgrade --install` without readiness flags, so the command returned before workloads were fully ready and gave weaker deploy-complete feedback than dspace-oci-redeploy.
resolution: Added readiness gating flags (`--wait --wait-for-jobs --timeout 180s`) and explicit rollout-wait messaging in the shared `_helm-oci-deploy` helper, plus a regression test that simulates an OCI chart deploy from a fake registry artifact.
